payload.description:
Feature: CLI IP resolution from .env

Scenario: Use .env when --ip not set
  Given a .env file with PIXOO_DEVICE_IP set
  And the CLI is run without --ip
  When the command resolves the target IP
  Then it uses the PIXOO_DEVICE_IP value

Scenario: --ip overrides .env
  Given a .env file with PIXOO_DEVICE_IP set
  When the CLI is run with --ip 192.168.0.99
  Then it uses 192.168.0.99
payload.title: CLI uses .env PIXOO_DEVICE_IP
